accept.description: True iff this frame is a usable Seinfeld training clip for ONE of the listed scene buckets.

bucket.description: Scene bucket. 'jerrys_apt' = Jerry's apartment (kitchen/living room, beige cabinets, exposed brick, big window). 'monks_diner' = Monk's coffee shop booth (formica table, vinyl seats, diner counter). 'other' = recognisable Seinfeld scene but not in the locked vocabulary. null = not a Seinfeld scene at all.

characters_visible.description: Which named characters are clearly visible in this frame. Use ['none'] if none of the four are clearly visible.

confidence.description: 0 to 1, your confidence in this assessment.

reasons.description: One short sentence justifying the decision. Cite specific visual cues.
